description_long: This is a modern, rectangular red couch with a smooth, uniform surface and a minimalist design. The couch features two large seat cushions and a continuous, slightly rounded backrest and armrests that are integrated into the main body. On the seat, there are five loose accent pillows in alternating yellow and green colors, adding a playful contrast to the solid red upholstery. The legs are short, cylindrical, and metallic, barely elevating the couch above the ground. The overall appearance is clean and contemporary, suitable for urban parks, public waiting areas, or outdoor lounges.
description: A modern red couch with smooth upholstery, two seat cushions, and five colorful accent pillows in yellow and green. It has short metallic legs and a minimalist, continuous back and armrest design.
description_view_0: Front view showing the full face of the couch, two seat cushions, and five accent pillows in yellow and green.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the depth of the couch, the thickness of the armrest, and the profile of the pillows.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the solid red backrest with no visible cushions or pillows.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the armrest and the staggered arrangement of the pillows.
attribute_cushion_arrangement: Two large seat cushions and five loose accent pillows (three green, two yellow) arranged along the backrest; all pillows are unattached and casually placed.
attribute_upholstery_pattern: Solid red upholstery with a smooth, untextured matte finish and no visible decorative stitching or patterns.
attribute_leg_style: Short, cylindrical, metallic legs that are exposed and minimally visible, providing a low profile.
attribute_armrest_design: Armrests are straight, thick, and integrated into the main body, matching the height of the backrest and covered in the same red fabric.
attribute_backrest_type: Continuous, medium-height backrest that is integrated with the armrests and covered in smooth red upholstery, with no visible tufting or division.
